titleStmt.title: SII 31.35: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 35. (A.R. No. B 240 of 1936.) VAḌḌEMKUNṬA, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the temple of Rāmalingasvāmi, about 1.5 k.m. to the west of the village.
This epigraph is dated Śaka 1190 Vibhava. Āshāḍha śu. 1. Thursday corresponding to June 13, Wednesday, 1268 A.D. f.d.t. °17.

It records the gift of 5 kha land in different localities and also as māḍa-vīsama of the income for maintaining the offerings and worship to the god Mailāradēva of Vaddagikuṁta by the aṁgaraksha Appana Bollināyaka for the merit of Kākatīya Rudradēva (i.e. Rudrama). The village Vaḍḍagikunṭa is described as Abhinava kaṭakam (new military camp).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1190 Agunēṭi vibhava saṁ
vatsara Āṣāḍha śu 1 gu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara
kākatīya rudradēva mahārājulaku dha¨rmmatta(ddha) mugā
nu Aṁgarakṣa Appana bollināyaṁkulu vaḍḍhaguṁ
ṭala Abhinavakaṭakaṁ mailāra dēvara yaṁga raṁga bhōgāla
ku Iccina vritti Ōgirāla cēlu velaṭūri teruvu
paḍumaṭa kha 1 na 10 bhōgaṁvāri
cēlu velaṭūri teruvu tū¨rppuna na 10 piralō
kula terupu dakṣaṇana sa 7 rāvikomu paḍu
maṭa kha 1 nu ceṟvulōna na 8 verasi kha 5
Āyaṁ māḍa vīsaṁgānu gu 1 . I stānamu ye
vvaru goniyāḍinā dhanadhānya samṛddhi Āyanu . stāna
pati śrīrāmapeddi . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yōharē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi varuṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatēkrimi[ḥ .*] paṁgatappulēdu .
Digital edition of SII 31.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
